ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the article */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link articles to their sources */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link articles to their types */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author(s) of the article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary or abstract of the article */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the main image associated with the article */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the article */,
  "read_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time to read the article in minutes */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is featured */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the article was updated */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the article has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES article_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., The Hindu, Live Mint) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., newspaper, online, blog) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the source was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the source information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the article type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the article type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the article type was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the article type information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., person, organization, location) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the entity is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the entity was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the entity information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the topic is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the topic was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the topic information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment */,
  "sentiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sentiment is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sentiment was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the sentiment information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_entities" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity mentioned in the article */,
  "relevance" INTEGER /* Relevance score of the entity in the article (0-100) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the relationship information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_topics" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the article belongs to */,
  "relevance" INTEGER /* Relevance score of the topic in the article (0-100) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the relationship information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_sentiments" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment expressed in the article */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the article (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the relationship information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the user account information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
